theme: authoritative regulator, court, and enforcement package hardening
goal: Promote LIMEN-000005 from captured-charge-document status to exact caption/case-number normalization using only the already captured public DOJ PDF and local bounded compute.

priority_case.task: Run OCR on the locally captured DOJ-linked indictment PDF and recover exact caption and case-number metadata if legible.
expected_outputs: Exact caption string from the document body if legible
Exact case number from the document body if legible
Patch-ready field updates for sources/authoritative-source-ledger.tsv, data/cases/authoritative-candidates.jsonl, and results/authoritative-scout/document-normalization-matrix-v0.1.tsv

local_probe_state.pdftotext: failed; output contained only form-feed bytes

safe_resource_limits.network: none required after local inputs are present

paper_thesis_use: Hostile-reviewer methods note distinguishing captured official court documents from OCR-ready documents.
Dashboard facet for document-processing barriers inside the court-family package.
Thesis reproducibility note on when lack of caption normalization is a compute/tooling issue rather than a source-availability issue.
success_condition: At least one exact court-anchor field becomes legible enough to patch shared ledgers, or OCR failure is reproduced with confidence metadata strong enough to keep the blocker class explicit.
boundary_notes: No PACER login, fees, sealed records, or private attachments.
Do not upgrade charging-stage allegations into adjudicated facts.
If OCR output is low-confidence or ambiguous, keep the current blocker status rather than guessing caption or case-number fields.
